gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer found import-fragility and false-pristine paths in dict ordering, raw equality, unsafe attribute access, dataclass metadata, closure cells, and recursive closures. Each finding was patched with subprocess regressions, and final re-review approved the scoped diff.
verification: Focused mutation/import tests passed; clean-import subclass checks passed; targeted regression set passed; full pytest passed; git diff --check passed; poetry check passed; poetry build passed.
what_changed: Hardened restaurant_kv_serving.databricks_job legacy class base selection with class body fingerprints for Databricks job dataclass configs.
why: Pre-import in-place mutations to public document_kv_cache.databricks_job dataclass classes could be treated as pristine, allowing mutated public class state to leak into the legacy compatibility wrapper.
